subject: [Shuning's Approval Needed] Oh Ee Ching | BPM Team - Corporate, FTE, Associate, Regional Cross Border

content.answer:
Hi Shuning,

As aligned with Alice and C&B, we would like to seek your approval for the
offer as detailed below. Proposing for *S$5,500 monthly,* this has been
aligned with Emily.

1. Package pay position is P50 to P75
2. Special considerations as follows

   - Candidate has received A ratings including final interviewer, with
   strong feedback on her relevant e2e product experience as an Associate
   (e.g. requirement gatherings, client management, prioritization design, UAT)
   - Increment % is high as Accenture as a organisation is not doing well
   which impacted their bonus pay out over the last 2 years.
   Even so, our proposed monthly is still in lined with the Associate BPMs
   hired across Regional teams, such as,
      - Shermaine Ting (2 YOE at point of offer) - MP Ops BPM
      - Koh Yu Xuan (1 YOE at point of offer)  - MP Ops BPM
      - Izak Goh (2.5 YOE at point of offer) - Reg SPX BPM

content.answer:
Hi Terence,

As aligned with Ian, Shuning, Alice and C&B, we would like to seek your
approval for the offer detailed below:


*Reason for Hiring: This HC has been aligned for hiring needs batch
alignment with Chris/Terence. *

*Summary of Offer Details *
*Legal Entity:* Shopee
*Employment Type:* FTE
*Nature of HC: *Backfill

*Job Rank: *Associate
*Job Title:* Associate, Regional Cross Border
*Intended Scope: *Regional Cross Border, Corporate

*Candidate Name:* Ms Oh Ee Ching
*Nationality: *Singaporean, Singapore Citizen
*Start Date:* 24 February 25
*Report to: *Ren Jiahui
*Sourcing Channel: * Linkedin

*To Offer: *

*Actual offer in local currency terms: *
*Monthly Salary: *5500 SGD
*Total Yearly Package (assuming average 14 months):* 77000 SGD
*Yearly Package % Increment*: This is about 43% increment in annual
package, inclusive of RSU value if any.
*Total Package in USD:* 56530 USD

*Current Salary: *
*- Monthly basic*: 4500 SGD
*- Others*: 400 SGD monthly allowance
*- Translated to Shopee's scheme: *4200 SGD monthly x 14 months = 77000 SGD
annually

*Expected Salary: *$5,700 monthly


*Candidate's Background Current Company:* Accenture, Business Architecture
Analyst (Techno-functional)
*Years of Working Experience:* 3
*Highest Qualification: *Master (full-time), NTU, Business Analytics, CGPA
4.71/5.0
Bachelor, NTU Biological Sciences, CGPA 4.15/5.0

*Interview Feedback: *
Ren Jiahui, Manager: A
Yeo Zhen Ning, Assistant Manager: A

Thank you.

Regards,

*Eugenia Peh*
Shopee | People Team | Recruitment
Address: 1 Fusionopolis Place, Galaxis, Singapore 138522
Take a sneak peek at how #LifeatShopee is like at the Shopee HQ
<https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OOU4FGfmHDo>!
